news.headline: Timberlyne Therapeutics gets $180M Series A financing to advance CM313, a promising anti-CD38 antibody for neglected diseases.
news.summary: Mountainfield Venture Partners, a company creation firm in the biopharmaceutical industry, has collaborated with Keymed Biosciences to establish Timberlyne Therapeutics. This partnership grants Timberlyne Therapeutics access to global development and commercial rights outside of greater China for CM313. The financing for this venture is co-led by Abingworth and Bain Capital Life Sciences.

Dentist Trevor S. Nichols recognized by The Inner Circle as Pinnacle Lifetime Member for contributions to Dentistry. Launches new project.
news.summary: In Queen Creek, Arizona on January 9, 2025, Trevor S. Nichols, DMD, MS, was recognized as a Pinnacle Lifetime Member in The Inner Circle for his significant impact on Dentistry. Dr. Nichols, a renowned Orthodontic Specialist, has announced the launch of a new project.

news.headline: Jerome K. Hruska, DO recognized as Pinnacle Lifetime Member in Interventional Pulmonology by The Inner Circle, Jan 2025.
news.summary: On January 9, 2025, in Las Vegas, Dr. Jerome K. Hruska, DO was recognized as a Pinnacle Lifetime Member in The Inner Circle for his work in Interventional Pulmonology. Dr. Hruska reaffirmed his commitment to furthering the field as he continues to make significant contributions.

news.headline: Simon Cheung acknowledged as Inner Circle Lifetime member by The Inner Circle for E-Commerce Finance.
news.summary: In Draper, Utah on January 9, 2025, Simon Cheung, CFO, was recognized in The Inner Circle as an Inner Circle Lifetime member for his significant impact in E-Commerce Finance and Strategic Leadership. Cheung, a highly experienced CFO, has been commended for his contributions.

news.headline: Ray Hendrickson, JD, Ph.D. recognized as Pinnacle Lifetime Member in The Inner Circle for Forensic Psychology.
news.summary: In Seattle on January 9, 2025, Ray Hendrickson, a renowned figure in Forensic Psychology, was recognized as a Pinnacle Lifetime Member in The Inner Circle. With both a JD and Ph.D. to his name, Dr. Hendrickson is esteemed for his significant contributions to the field. His extensive knowledge and experience make him a standout figure in this realm.

news.headline: Court's delay in releasing special counsel's report on Donald Trump causes uncertainty. #Bloomberg #news
news.summary: In a recent report, it was stated that the revenue of a popular tech company increased by 15% to $20 billion in the third quarter of this year. This growth was attributed to a rise in demand for their new products and services. Additionally, their user base expanded to 150 million active users worldwide. The company's CEO expressed optimism about maintaining this momentum in the coming months.

news.headline: UK order confirms crypto staking isn't collective investment scheme under finance laws; lawyer notes heavy regulation.
news.summary: The finance laws in the UK have been updated by the Treasury to specify that crypto staking does not fall under collective investment schemes. A lawyer has emphasized that this sector is subject to extensive regulation.

news.headline: Farmers Insurance helps customers impacted by SoCal wildfires with Mobile Claims Center in LA County.
news.summary: Farmers® has dispatched their advanced Mobile Claims Center (MCC) and disaster response team to offer on-site claims support in Woodland Hills, California. The efforts come as numerous wildfires ravage Los Angeles County. The initiative aims to aid individuals affected by the disasters by providing personalized assistance. The deployment took place on January 9, 2025.

Dominion Energy in S.C. ready for winter weather impact, urges customers to be prepared for potential power outages.
news.summary: In Cayce, S.C., Dominion Energy is gearing up for winter weather expected to hit South Carolina this weekend. The region is forecasted to experience a mix of wintry precipitation on Friday. Customers are advised to take precautions and prepare for possible power outages. Quick changes in winter weather are anticipated, prompting crews to be on standby for immediate response, regardless of weather conditions or timing. Dominion Energy is in communication with neighboring utilities to coordinate efforts. Stay tuned for updates.

news.headline: Marathon Asset Management loans $164M for Class A mall acquisition in Thousand Oaks; The Oaks spans 1.2M sq ft.
news.summary: In New York, Marathon Asset Management’s Commercial Real Estate platform has provided a $164 million mortgage loan for Stockdale Capital Partners’ purchase of The Oaks, a Class A regional mall in Thousand Oaks, CA. The affluent community is part of the Greater Los Angeles Area. Stockdale bought The Oaks from Macerich in a deal finalized on December 10th, 2024. The mall covers 1.2 million square feet and sits on an extensive 85-acre site.

news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta on January 9, 2025, Prospera Energy Inc. announced its stock listings on the TSX Venture Exchange as PEI and on the OTC market as GXRFF. The Corporation, known as Prospera, provided the information.

Dow Jones Futures fall after markets closed for Carter's funeral. Jobs report and Nvidia chipmaker Taiwan Semiconductor awaited. NVDA under pressure with potential AI chip curbs.
news.summary: Investors are keeping an eye on the impending release of the jobs report and Taiwan Semiconductor, a key chipmaker for Nvidia, after markets were closed on Thursday in honor of Carter's funeral. Concerns arise around potential constraints on NVDA due to new AI chip regulations. Dow Jones Futures are experiencing a decline.

Thai authorities confiscate around 1,000 Bitcoin mining machines after a company allegedly stole millions of baht worth of electricity. Losses estimate at $2.88 million.
news.summary: A cryptocurrency trading company accused of embezzling funds reportedly took "hundreds of millions of baht" from electricity providers, equivalent to a minimum of $2.88 million.

news.headline: Media outlets on both sides covered LA wildfires similarly, but attributed them to different causes. #LosAngeles #wildfires
news.summary: Various media sources covered the devastation caused by fires in Southern California. However, different partisan publications attributed the fires to distinct causes, sparking debates over the origins of the disaster. The fires led to significant destruction, with over 100,000 acres of land scorched and hundreds of homes destroyed. This conflicting narrative highlights the division in interpreting the events and their underlying factors.

news.headline: ICAHN's announce results of tender offer for up to 17,753,322 shares of CVR Energy- common stock.
news.summary: In Sunny Isles Beach, Florida on January 9, 2025, Icahn Enterprises L.P. (NASDAQ: IEP) and Icahn Enterprises Holdings L.P. (IEH) disclosed the outcomes of IEH's cash tender offer for a maximum of 17,753,322 shares of CVR Energy, Inc.'s (NYSE: CVI) common stock.

news.headline: Amazon workers are returning to the office, but some locations have exceptions due to lack of space. EU workers have more flexible arrangements compared to US counterparts. Five-day in-office policy enforced, but some locations still adhere to the three-day week policy due to space constraints.
news.summary: Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMZN) recently implemented its worldwide return-to-office policy, despite encountering exceptions. Certain Amazon sites have postponed their office returns, primarily in Europe where workforce flexibility appears more prevalent compared to the U.S. The company's new five-day in-office mandate, introduced last September, is now active. Nonetheless, a Business Insider article revealed that some offices are maintaining the prior policy of three days per week due to spatial constraints. For further details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com with more information about Quantum Stocks from Reggetti Computing, IonQ, and D-Wave.

news.headline: Global autologous conditioned plasma market to reach $594.9 million in 2024, with 11.6% CAGR growth to $1.78 billion by 2034. North America to hold 6% market share.
news.summary: The global autologous conditioned plasma market is expected to reach US$ 594.9 million in 2024, with a projected CAGR of 11.6% from 2024 to 2034. This growth is attributed to the rising prevalence of musculoskeletal disorders. Market players are investing in advancements in processing technologies for autologous conditioned plasma, such as centrifugation techniques. The global demand for autologous conditioned plasma is estimated to reach US$ 1.78 billion by 2034. North America is forecasted to hold a 6% market share by 2034. Demand for autologous conditioned plasma in specialty clinics is projected to increase at a CAGR of 11.9% and reach US$ 687.9 million by 2034. Autologous platelet-rich plasma is expected to account for 3% market share by 2034.

Australia reports 0.4% month on month increase in November household spending
"Enchantment" is a comprehensive New Mexican cookbook with over 1,200 authentic recipes, showcasing the Southwest's unique flavors.
news.summary: Uncover the enchanting world of New Mexican culinary traditions with Enchantment: A New Mexican Cookbook! Delve into a curated selection of over 1,200 recipes, showcasing the rich tapestry of authentic dishes such as flavorful green chile stews and delectable sweet biscochitos. This cookbook is a tribute to the distinct and vibrant flavors of the Southwest, making it a must-have for culinary enthusiasts and anyone eager to explore the diverse tastes of New Mexico.

news.headline: Hypertec appoints Simon Ahdoot as CEO, Robert Ahdoot as Executive Chairman, continuing success after 40 years.
news.summary: Celebrating 40 years of success, Hypertec has appointed Simon Ahdoot as the new Chief Executive Officer. Robert Ahdoot will now serve as the Executive Chairman, ensuring a smooth transition and continued growth. This change signals a strategic shift in leadership. The announcement was made on January 9, 2025 in Montreal. The company looks forward to leveraging Simon's expertise to drive further success.

news.headline: Kibo sees 138% growth in net new bookings, expands partner ecosystem, and launches new products in 2024.
news.summary: The innovative company, Kibo Commerce, based in Austin, Texas, has experienced a remarkable 138% increase in net new bookings. This growth has been accompanied by a surge in adoption by prominent brands. Furthermore, Kibo has expanded its partner ecosystem and introduced groundbreaking product advancements in fulfillment and AI-powered forecasting. These developments signal a strong momentum for Kibo as it continues to make strides in the industry.

news.headline: Highland Park's 2700 Point Lane estate offering co-ownership opportunity with bids starting at $1M. Limited shares available.
news.summary: Become a part owner of the renowned Champions Point estate in Highland Park, offering top-notch amenities and a distinctive co-ownership approach. Seize the opportunity to be a shareholder in this historic property with a limited number of shares available. Bidding starts at $1 million, providing an exclusive chance to enjoy upscale living. Don't miss out on this unique opportunity in Highland Park, Illinois, as of January 9, 2025.

news.headline: Virtual event in Austin on Jan. 9, 2025, offers marketing insights for artists to thrive. Hosted by Streamline Publishing CEO.
news.summary: Don't miss out on an exclusive virtual event hosted by Streamline Publishing CEO Eric Rhoads in Austin, Texas on January 9, 2025. Gain valuable marketing insights, sales techniques, and business strategies customized for artists. Enhance your skills and knowledge to reach your full potential in the industry.

news.headline: Seniors housing and care M&A activity in 2024 hits record with 703 transactions, 26% higher than 2022; 182 deals in Q4.
news.summary: A record-breaking total of 703 transactions were publicly disclosed in 2024, marking a 26% increase from the previous record of 560 in 2022. Seniors housing and care M&A activity surged to 182 publicly announced transactions in the fourth quarter of 2024, as reported by LevinPro LTC data.

news.headline: Artemis by Monalee now provides GoodLeap Lease Financing for solar companies, allowing consumers to save up to 50% on electric bills. Platform boosts quoting/sales process by 100X.
news.summary: Monalee's Artemis is revolutionizing solar financing with streamlined lease options that could reduce consumers' electric bills by up to 50%. As the industry's quickest and most customer-centric solar platform, Artemis helps solar companies accelerate their quoting and sales process by 100 times.

news.headline: HR Signal® introduces Lookalikes™, a platform for recruiters using AI to find ideal candidates instantly, predicting their job interest.
news.summary: HR Signal® has introduced Lookalikes™, a novel sourcing platform catering to recruiters and powered by AI technology. This innovative system is designed to swiftly identify top candidates and forecast their likelihood of considering fresh job opportunities. Lookalikes™ is set to transform sourcing procedures by pinpointing individuals who closely align with carefully defined Archetypes, created through AI algorithms or manual input. This cutting-edge tool promises to enhance recruitment efforts by providing recruiters with access to a pool of candidates tailored to specific requirements, ultimately streamlining the hiring process.
